_comment: Per-product QA identities, read by provision-qa-accounts.mjs AND the portfolio-gate test-accounts audit/fixer. Generated per product by new-product.mjs (which substitutes the QA test domain). A third-party deployment sets the QA_TEST_DOMAIN env var to its own domain so it provisions its own QA accounts ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â nothing here references the operator's personal email. qaDomain MUST be a real, mail-capable domain if the QA agents need to pass email-delivery checks (VT_C1/C3/C4); otherwise those run na.
